Assassinate.name: Assassinate
Assassinate.description: A melee attack that can only hit from behind. This attack ignores shield and has 50% crit chance.

Assassinate2.description:
A melee attack that can only hit from behind. This attack ignores shield and has 100% crit chance.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

BoostBackstab.name: Boost Backstab
BoostBackstab.description: Until end of turn, your backstabs do +75% more damage and ignore shield.

BoostBackstab2.description: Until end of turn, your backstabs do +75% more damage, ignore shield, and inflict Bleed and Poison.

PoisonGas.name: Poison Gas
PoisonGas.description: Inflict Poison 1 on all units adjacent to you.

PoisonGas2.description: Inflict Poison 2 on all units adjacent to you (even diagonally).

PoisonNail.name: Poison Nail
PoisonNail.description: Throw a nail that inflicts Poison and ignores shield.

PoisonNail2.description: Throw 2 nails that inflict Poison and ignore shield.

WeakeningNail.name: Weakening Nail
WeakeningNail.description: Throw a nail that inflicts Weakness and ignores shield.

WeakeningNail2.description: Throw 2 nails that inflict Weakness and ignore shield.

SharpNail.name: Sharp Nail
SharpNail.description: Throw a nail that inflicts Bleed and ignores shield.

SharpNail2.description: Throw 2 nails that inflict Bleed and ignore shield.

CoinToss.name: Coin Toss
CoinToss.description:
Throw a coin that deals damage.
RELOAD: Collect a coin.
[s:.7]This spell costs more mana each additional time you use it on the same turn.[/s]

CoinToss2.description:
Throw a coin at infinite range with +50% crit chance that ignores shield.
RELOAD: Collect a coin.
[s:.7]This spell costs more mana each additional time you use it on the same turn.[/s]

MoveAgain2.description:
Refresh your movement action.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

AttackAgain2.description:
Refresh your basic attack.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

Camouflage2.description: Gain Stealth. Attacking while stealthed has a 100% critical hit chance.

Shadow.name: Shadow
Shadow.description:
Teleport behind a unit.
[s:.7]Nothin' personnel, kid.[/s]

Shadow2.description:
Teleport behind a unit. Your next action has +100% crit chance.
[s:.7]Nothin' personnel, kid.[/s]

TimeWalk.name: Time Walk
TimeWalk.description:
Take an extra turn at the end of the round.
[s:.7](This spell can't be cast on extra turns.)[/s]

TimeWalk2.description:
Take an extra turn at the end of the round.
[s:.7](This spell can't be cast on extra turns. This spell costs less.)[/s]

Distract.name: Distract
Distract.description: Make a unit face away from you.

Distract2.description: Make any unit look away from you. This has a 33% chance to inflict Confusion.

Rebound.name: Rebound
Rebound.description: A melee attack that rebounds you backwards 10 tiles.

Rebound2.description: A melee attack that rebounds you backwards 10 tiles. Deal damage to any unit you collide with.

CutPurse.name: Cut Purse
CutPurse.description: Throw a nail that knocks coins out of units it hits and ignores shield.

CutPurse2.description: Throw 2 nails that knock coins out of units they hit and ignore shield.

PickPocket.name: Pickpocket
PickPocket.description: Steal 1-3 coins from a unit and give it -1 Damage.

PickPocket2.description: Steal 3-5 coins from a unit, give it -1 Damage, and apply some extra debuffs at random.

Backflip.name: Backflip
Backflip.description: Backflip out of the way the next time you're targeted by an enemy.

Backflip2.description:
Backflip out of the way the next time you're targeted by an enemy.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

Blur.name: Blur
Blur.description:
Gain +10% dodge chance.
Disable this spell if you have more than 65% dodge chance.

Blur2.description:
Gain +15% dodge chance. 
Disable this spell if you have more than 80% dodge chance.

GreedStep.name: Greedstep
GreedStep.description: Teleport to a tile with coins on it.

GreedStep2.description: Teleport to a tile with coins on it, then spawn 1-2 coins on random tiles.

Stalk.name: Stalk
Stalk.description:
Target any unit. Teleport behind it at the start of your next turn.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

Stalk2.description:
Target any unit. Teleport behind it at the start of your next turn.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn. Costs 0 mana.)[/s]

NailFlurry2.description: Throw 10 1-damage nails that ignore shield. Throw extra nails equal to your [img:dex].

Declaw.name: Declaw
Declaw.description: A melee attack that inflicts -1 Damage and Bleed.

Declaw2.description: A 2-hit melee attack that inflicts -1 Damage and Bleed.

QuickRoll.name: Quick Roll
QuickRoll.description:
Roll in a straight line up to three tiles.
RELOAD: Backstab a unit.

QuickRoll2.description:
Roll in a straight or diagonal line up to five tiles.
RELOAD: Backstab a unit.

Slice.name: Slice
Slice.description: A melee attack that has all effects of your basic attack and ignores shield.

Slice2.description:
A melee attack that has all effects of your basic attack and ignores shield.
[s:.7](This spell is free the 1st time you use it each turn.)[/s]

PocketSand.name: Pocket Sand
PocketSand.description: Inflict Blind on all units in a small cone.

PocketSand2.description: Inflict Blind 2 on all units in a larger cone.

Nightshade.name: Nightshade
Nightshade.description: Inflict Poison 4 on an adjacent unit.

Nightshade2.description:
Inflict Poison 4 on an adjacent unit.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

Shadowshift.name: Shadow Shift
Shadowshift.description:
Teleport exactly 2 tiles away, leaving behind a shadow that mimics your basic attack.
[s:.7](The shadow fades at the end of your turn.)[/s]

Shadowshift2.description:
Teleport up to 3 tiles away, leaving behind a shadow that mimics your basic attack.
[s:.7](The shadow fades at the end of your turn.)[/s]

SlingShade.name: Slingshade
SlingShade.description:
Spawn a shadow up to 3 tiles away that mimics your basic attack.
[s:.7](The shadow fades at the end of your turn.)[/s]

SlingShade2.description:
Spawn a shadow up to 5 tiles away that mimics your basic attack.
[s:.7](The shadow fades at the end of your turn.)[/s]
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

Caltrops.name: Caltrops
Caltrops.description: Move up to 3 tiles, spreading glass shards on the tiles you walk through.

Caltrops2.description: Move up to 5 tiles, spreading glass shards on the tiles you walk through.

PierceShot.name: Pierce Shot
PierceShot.description: Throw a nail that passes through units and ignores shield.

PierceShot2.description: Throw an infinite range nail that passes through units and ignores shield.

Cheat.name: Cheat
Cheat.description: Gain temporary +5 [img:lck] until your next turn.

Cheat2.description: Gain temporary +10 [img:lck] until your next turn.

VenomBarrage.name: Venom Barrage
VenomBarrage.description: Throw a nail that inflicts Poison 1 and ignores shield at each enemy in your line of sight.

VenomBarrage2.description: Throw 2 nails that inflict Poison 1 and ignore shield at each enemy in your line of sight.

LootCorpse.name: Loot Corpse
LootCorpse.description:
Loot 1-3 coins from a body... and possibly something else?
[s:.7](This might destroy the body)[/s]

LootCorpse2.description:
Loot 1-3 coins from a body... and possibly something else?
[s:.7](This might not destroy the body)[/s]
[s:.7](Your chance of finding "something else" is significantly increased.)[/s]

SeverArtery.name: Sever Artery
SeverArtery.description: A weak melee attack. If this crits, inflict Bleed 5.

SeverArtery2.description: A weak melee attack. If this crits inflict Bleed 5 and you gain All Stats Up.

SharpenNail.name: Sharpen Nail
SharpenNail.description: Gain +1 [img:dex] and +1 Range until the end of the battle.

SharpenNail2.description:
Gain +1 [img:dex] and +1 Range until the end of the battle.
[s:.7]Automatically cast this spell at the end of each round for free.[/s]

SneakUp.name: Sneak Up
SneakUp.description: Teleport directly behind a random enemy.

SneakUp2.description:
Teleport directly behind a random enemy.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

Shank.name: Shank
Shank.description: An attack that hits 2 times from behind.

Shank2.description: An attack that hits 3 times from behind.

StealKidney.name: Steal Kidney
StealKidney.description: A melee attack with increased critical hit chance. If this crits and your trinket slot is empty, gain a kidney, then inflict Bleed 1.

StealKidney2.description: A melee attack with increased critical hit chance that inflicts Bleed and Bruise 1. If this crits and your trinket slot is empty, gain a kidney, then inflict Bleed 1.

StealLuck.name: Steal Luck
StealLuck.description: A weak melee attack. If this crits, inflict -1 [img:lck] and you gain +1 [img:lck].

StealLuck2.name: Steal Luck
StealLuck2.description: A weak melee attack that inflicts -1 [img:lck] and you gain +1 [img:lck].

ThiefSwap.name: Over Here, Over There
ThiefSwap.description:
Swap positions with an ally. Swap back at the end of your turn.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

ThiefSwap2.description:
Swap positions with any unit. Swap back at the end of your turn. If the unit was an enemy, inflict Confusion 1.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

Pierce.name: Pierce
Pierce.description: Gain +2 Range. Your attacks pass through units and ignore shield for the rest of the turn.

Pierce2.description:
Gain +4 Range. Your attacks pass through units and ignore shield for the rest of the turn.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

WindUp.name: Wind Up
WindUp.description: Gain +1 Range for the rest of the turn.

TripleNails.name: Triple Nails
TripleNails.description: Throw 3 nails straight and diagonally in front of you. These nails have the effects of your basic attack and ignore shield.

TripleNails2.description: Throw 3 nails straight and diagonally in front of you 2 times. These nails have the effects of your basic attack and ignore shield.

SkinDisguise.name: Skin Disguise
SkinDisguise.description:
Destroy an adjacent body. Enemies won't attack you until your next turn.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

SkinDisguise2.description:
Destroy a body in range 3. Enemies won't attack you until your next turn.
[s:.7](This spell is free. Castable once per turn.)[/s]

Chakram.name: Chakram
Chakram.description: Throw a projectile that passes through units and then returns to you. This can collect pickups.

Chakram2.description: Throw a projectile that passes through units and then returns to you. At its apex, it deals increased damage and always crits. This can collect pickups.

Jitter.name: Jitter
Jitter.description: Inflict Confusion 1 on each adjacent unit.

Jitter2.description: Inflict Confusion 1 on each unit within 3 tiles of you.

StealTime.name: Steal Time
StealTime.description: A melee attack. If this crits, refresh your basic attack and movement actions.

StealTime2.description: A melee attack with +30% crit chance. If this crits, refresh your basic attack and movement actions.

Outskirts.name: Outskirts
Outskirts.description: Teleport to a tile on the edge of the map.

Outskirts2.description: Teleport to a tile on the edge of the map. Gain +2 Damage for the rest of the turn.

PoisonDip.name: Poison Dip
PoisonDip.description:
Spend all your mana. For every 5 mana spent, your basic attack inflicts +1 Poison.
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]

PoisonDip2.description:
Spend all your mana. For every 3 mana spent, your basic attack inflicts +1 Poison.
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]

LuckyPenny.name: Lucky Penny
LuckyPenny.description: Collect an adjacent pickup and gain +2 [img:lck] instead of its normal effects.

LuckyPenny2.description: Collect a pickup within four tiles of you. Gain +2 [img:lck] instead of its normal effects.
